sprint.title: Voice Reliability v1: Microphone Error Handling + Graceful UX (Wizard + Studio)
sprint.goal: Handle all microphone-related failure scenarios gracefully across the app: Questions & Answers mic and Studio textbox mic. Provide clear, elder-friendly messages, recovery actions, and consistent state handling so users never feel stuck.
definitionOfDone: All common mic failures are detected and mapped to friendly, actionable messages
Wizard Q&A mic and Studio textbox mic share the same error handling layer
UI covers: permission denied, no mic device, mic busy, browser not supported, insecure context, audio capture failed, silent audio, STT/network errors
Recovery actions exist: Retry, Open browser settings instructions, Switch input, Use typing instead
Mic indicator is never left ‘stuck on’; streams are always released on stop/error/unmount
Errors are logged with stable error codes to Sentry (no transcript/audio content)
Automated tests cover error mapping and key UI states

backlog.title: Create microphone error taxonomy (stable codes) + user-friendly copy map

copyRules: Offer 'Use typing instead' as a safe fallback

acceptanceTests: Every error code has a copy entry
Copy is consistent across Wizard and Studio

backlog.title: Detect mic capability and permissions proactively (preflight checks)

checks: Permissions API check (if available): microphone state
behavior: If failing preflight, disable mic button and show tooltip/info
If permission is 'prompt', allow user to click mic to request
constraints: Do not request permissions automatically; only on user gesture

acceptanceTests: On unsupported browser, mic is disabled with explanation
On no device, user sees 'No microphone detected' message

backlog.title: Centralize voice session lifecycle with guaranteed cleanup (no stuck mic)

lifecycle: Single active recorder at a time (shared lock)
On stop/error/unmount: stop tracks, cleanup audio context, cancel timers
constraints: Works both in Wizard Q&A and Studio overlay
No memory leaks after repeated recordings

acceptanceTests: Mic indicator turns off after stop/error
Starting in Studio while Wizard recording shows a friendly 'Finish current recording' message

backlog.title: Wizard Q&A mic: graceful error UI + fallback to typing

errorActions: How to enable mic (opens help modal)
constraints: Do not wipe typed answer on error

acceptanceTests: Permission denied shows clear instructions and typing fallback
No mic device shows 'No microphone detected'
Retry works after resolving issue

backlog.title: Studio textbox mic: graceful error UI in overlay + append behavior preserved

behavior: On error: do not modify textbox content
On success: append transcript with spacing rules (existing)
Locked page/textbox: mic action disabled with tooltip
constraints: Overlay should not block canvas interactions outside its bounds
Cancel always returns to previous editor state

acceptanceTests: Denied permission shows overlay error + Use typing instead
No device shows correct message
After fixing permission, retry works and appends transcript

backlog.title: Silent audio and short recording detection (user guidance)

detection: If recording duration < X ms, show 'Recording too short' message
If RMS level remains below threshold for Y seconds, show 'No speech detected' hint
If STT returns empty transcript, show 'Couldn’t hear that—try again' guidance
constraints: Do not be overly sensitive (avoid false positives)
Never blame user; suggest moving closer to mic

acceptanceTests: Silent recording triggers a helpful hint
Empty transcript triggers retry suggestion

backlog.title: STT/network/provider error handling (timeouts, rate limits, provider errors) with retry/backoff

backend: Return stable error codes for provider failures
Optional: single retry with backoff for transient network failures
frontend: Map backend error codes to friendly messages
Offer Retry and fallback to typing
constraints: Do not log transcript/audio in errors

acceptanceTests: Timeout shows 'Taking too long' message with Retry
Provider 429/5xx mapped correctly

backlog.title: Help content: mic troubleshooting guide (browser steps) + link from error UI

content: How to enable microphone permission in Chrome/Edge/Safari
What to do if mic is in use by another app
How to select correct input device in OS settings
constraints: Keep steps short and screenshot-friendly (no heavy docs)

acceptanceTests: Help is reachable from both Wizard and Studio error UI
Copy is clear and actionable

backlog.title: Observability: Sentry breadcrumbs + error grouping for voice flows

constraints: No PII, no audio blobs, no transcript content in logs

acceptanceTests: Errors appear in Sentry grouped by stable code
Breadcrumbs show where it happened (wizard vs studio)

backlog.title: QA + automated tests (error mapping, preflight, UI states)

manualChecklist: Permission denied: shows correct message + steps + typing fallback (wizard + studio)
Mic in use: correct message (wizard + studio)
automation: Unit: voiceErrorCopy map covers all codes
Unit: preflight detects unsupported browser/insecure context
UI: error card renders correct actions for MIC_PERMISSION_DENIED
Integration: STT error code mapping displayed in UI

acceptanceTests: At least 6 tests added and passing
No stuck mic sessions after errors

notes: The key is consistency: the same error codes and copy should appear in both Wizard and Studio.
Always provide a non-voice fallback (typing) so users can continue their story even if mic fails.
